Tests for distutils.
The tests for distutils are defined in the distutils.tests package;
the test_suite() function there returns a test suite that's ready to
be run.
	distutilsZ
testsZ
test_suite)
+/usr/lib64/python3.9/test/test_distutils.py
load_tests
testZ
supportZ

__main__)
__doc__Z

test.supportr

unittest
